message:
Reduce breadcrumb font size to text-sm for visual hierarchy

The breadcrumb component previously used text-xs (12px), conflicting
with the design system. Updating to text-sm (14px) improves visual
hierarchy with page titles while maintaining readability.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
